name: B: Mobile Command Center — Telegram to API

parameters.jsonBody: ={"chat_id":{{ $('Identity Router').first().json.chatId }},"text":"🎤 Los mensajes de voz no están disponibles aún. Escribe tu comando en texto."}

={
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 512,
  "messages": [{
    "role": "user",
    "content": {{ JSON.stringify(
      ($('Identity Router').first().json.tier === 'admin'
        ? 'You are an API router for Porta D'irta hotel. Today is ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '.
Output ONLY a JSON object, no markdown, no explanation.
The "action" field MUST be EXACTLY one of these strings (copy exactly, no variations):
  beds24.getOccupancy
  beds24.getPrices
  beds24.listBookings
  beds24.blockRoom
  beds24.updatePrice
  beds24.blockRoom
  beds24.cancelBooking
  tastyigniter.listReservations
  tastyigniter.checkAvailability
  tastyigniter.deleteReservation
  hievents.getTicketCounts
  unknown
Schema: {"action":"<exact string from list above>","payload":{"date":"YYYY-MM-DD","startDate":"YYYY-MM-DD","endDate":"YYYY-MM-DD","roomId":null,"price":null,"bookingId":null,"guests":null},"isDestructive":false,"confirmationMessage":"","humanReadableSummary":"<one sentence in Spanish>"}
Rules: isDestructive=true for blockRoom/updatePrice/cancelBooking/deleteReservation. Dates use YYYY-MM-DD and current year. For weekly queries set startDate=Monday endDate=Sunday. If command is unclear use action="unknown".'
        : 'You are an API router. Output ONLY JSON, no markdown.
The "action" field MUST be EXACTLY one of: beds24.getOccupancy, tastyigniter.listReservations, tastyigniter.checkAvailability, hievents.getTicketCounts, unknown.
Schema: {"action":"","payload":{},"isDestructive":false,"confirmationMessage":"","humanReadableSummary":""}')
      + '

COMMAND: ' + $json.text
    ) }}
  }]
}

        ? 'You are an API router for Porta D'irta hotel. Today is ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '.

The "action" field MUST be EXACTLY one of these strings:
  beds24.getOccupancy
  beds24.listBookings
  beds24.updatePrice
  beds24.blockRoom
  beds24.cancelBooking

  unknown
Schema: {"action":"<exact string from list>","payload":{"date":"YYYY-MM-DD","startDate":"YYYY-MM-DD","endDate":"YYYY-MM-DD","roomId":null,"roomName":"","price":null,"bookingId":null,"guests":null},"humanReadableSummary":"<one sentence result confirmation in Spanish>"}
Rules: Dates use YYYY-MM-DD format current year. Weekly queries: startDate=Monday endDate=Sunday. Unknown commands use action=unknown. NEVER add isDestructive or confirmationMessage fields.'
        : 'You are an API router. Output ONLY JSON.
Actions: beds24.getOccupancy, tastyigniter.listReservations, tastyigniter.checkAvailability, hievents.getTicketCounts, unknown.
Schema: {"action":"","payload":{},"humanReadableSummary":""}')
      + '

COMMAND: ' + $json.text
    ) }}
  }]
}

mn06db2s.confirmationMessage: Se bloquearán todas las habitaciones para hoy (2026-03-21). ¿Desea continuar?
mn06db2s.humanReadableSummary: Bloquear todas las habitaciones del hotel para el día de hoy.

mn06gpou.confirmationMessage: ¿Deseas actualizar el precio de Cala Aljub a 160€ del 1 al 15 de mayo de 2026?
mn06gpou.humanReadableSummary: Actualizar el precio de la habitación Cala Aljub a 160€ desde el 1 al 15 de mayo de 2026.

mn0b3qhd.confirmationMessage: ¿Confirma el aumento de precio de Cala Aljub a 220€ desde el 1 al 15 de mayo?

mn0bizqo.confirmationMessage: ¿Confirma que desea actualizar el precio de Cala Aljub a 220€ del 1 al 15 de mayo de 2026?
